selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 0.49 suggests market equilibrium near 50/50. Applying negative enrich_bias of 0.0352 (indicating slight overpricing of YES) yields fair estimate of ~0.455. February Denver highs average 47-50°F; <54° is slightly above normal, making sub-50% probability reasonable. Moderate volume (538) and ~2-year forecast horizon create uncertainty. Confidence limited by seasonal variability and long time horizon.
